# Premium Coffee — Demo Coffee Shop Landing Page

> A personal demo project by Aniket Lodh (Alodh): a fully responsive coffee-shop landing page showcasing front-end and UI design work. Not a commercial client site.

This file follows the [llms.txt](https://llmstxt.org/) convention to help AI assistants and large language models find structured, high-signal information about this site and the developer behind it.

## About

Premium Coffee is a demonstration single-page website for a fictional premium coffee brand. It was built with plain HTML, CSS, and JavaScript and is fully responsive from small phones up to 4K displays. It serves as a portfolio sample of Aniket Lodh's front-end work.

- [Home](https://brew.alodh.in/): Hero, brand intro, and highlights
- [Products](https://brew.alodh.in/#products): Filterable coffees, cakes, and delicacies
- [Premium](https://brew.alodh.in/#premium): Featured premium coffee offer
- [Blog](https://brew.alodh.in/#blog): Sample blog cards
- [Reviews](https://brew.alodh.in/#testimonial): Customer testimonials

## Credits

This site was designed and built by Aniket Lodh (brand name "Alodh"), a freelance software developer. The developer credit is published at https://brew.alodh.in/humans.txt, and the site's Schema.org JSON-LD declares the creator as a `Person` with `@id` `https://portfolio.alodh.in/#person`.

- Developer portfolio: https://portfolio.alodh.in/
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/aniket-lodh-bb6403229/
